name: Panocha Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup C&H Brown Sugar, 1/2 cup C&H Granulated Sugar, 1/2 cup water, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Slowly bring to a boil, stirring occasionally until the sugar dissolves.
3. Boil slowly until it reaches 246 degrees (firm-ball stage).
4. Remove from heat and stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla.
5. Add 2-1/2 cups walnut halves; stir until nuts are coated and sugary.
6. Quickly spread on waxed paper or foil and separate the nuts with two forks.
7. Let cool.
